issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card text states '[When Attacking]' which is an attack trigger, not an activated ability.
Missing mandatory milling action. Effect requires trashing 2 cards from top of deck before playing a character. Current DSL only searches deck without milling.
SearchDeck filter incomplete. Missing type filter for '{Thriller Bark Pirates}' characters. Filter should include 'type' or 'characterType' constraint.
Destination should be 'trash' not 'board'. Card plays from trash, not directly to board. Should use 'PlayFromTrash' action type or equivalent.
Condition logic incomplete. The ➁ notation with DON cost means you must pay/rest 1 DON to activate. Current condition only checks presence, not payment/rest action.
